channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Middle East latest: Israeli military renews orders for Palestinians to leave northern Gaza
item.description: The Israeli military on Saturday renewed its orders for Palestinian in the northern Gaza Strip to leave their homes and shelters as troops press on a weeklong offensive against militants.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hindus in Bangladesh celebrate their largest festival under tight security following attacks
item.description: DHAKA, Bangladesh (AP) — Schoolteacher Supriya Sarker is glad to celebrate Bangladesh's largest Hindu festival of Durga Puja but feels the festivities would be more jubilant without the fear and violence that overshadow this year's event.
item.dc:creator: JULHAS ALAM and Al EMRUN GARJON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Menendez brothers murder trial was 'classic battle of the sexes,' juror says
item.description: Hazel Thornton, who served as a juror during Erik and Lyle Menendez's trial, said that the men on the jury weren't swayed by claims that their father abused the brothers sexually.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What's behind the northern lights that dazzled the sky farther south than normal
item.description: Another in a series of unusually strong solar storms hitting Earth produced stunning skies full of pinks, purples, greens and blues farther south than normal, including into parts of Germany, the United Kingdom, New England and New York City.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Missing Texas mother: Suzanne Simpson's neighbor witnessed fight
item.description: Simpson, a mother of four and real estate agent, disappeared after an alleged fight with her husband Brad Simpson, 53.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Far from where Hurricane Milton hit, tornadoes wrought unexpected damage
item.description: WELLINGTON, Fla. (AP) — Tony Brazzale, a diving boat captain who has lived for 10 years in his Wellington home in southeastern Florida, wasn't worried about Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and CHRISTOPHER L. KELLER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ted Cruz and Colin Allred wage another big US Senate fight in Texas
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — Attack ads on every TV break. Campaign money pouring in. And on a sunny Saturday, a crowd stretching out the door for a campaign rally at Tulip's, a popular Fort Worth nightclub — this time for Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY and JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Floridians evacuated for Hurricane Milton after wake-up call from devastating Helene
item.description: BRANDON, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents who fled hundreds of miles to escape Hurricane Milton made slow trips home on crowded highways, weary from their long journeys and the cleanup work awaiting them but also grateful to be coming back alive.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY ONEIL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Over 9 million pounds of ready-to-eat meat, poultry recalled: USDA
item.description: The products may be contaminated with Listeria monocytogenes, according to the U.S. Department of Agriculture.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, KTLA 5

item.title: 3 in 5 millennials want full access to abortion: Study
item.description: The largest percentile of individuals who do not want to live in a "fully legal" abortion state is Gen Z at 33%, followed by Gen X and Baby Boomers (30%).
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, WGN 9

item.title: Residents slog through flooded streets, clear debris after Hurricane Milton tore through Florida
item.description: LITHIA, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents slogged through flooded streets, gathered up scattered debris and assessed damage to their homes on Friday after Hurricane Milton smashed through coastal communities and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS O'MEARA, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY O'NEIL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: North Carolina governor blasts 'flat out lie' from Trump on disaster aid
item.description: "Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories have hurt the morale of first responders and people who lost everything, helped scam artists and put government and rescue workers in danger," said North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: 3 Europeans engineered $95M Texas Lotto win with over 25M tickets
item.description: It was successful for one group last year, but Texas Lottery officials have made changes to inhibit anyone else from trying it.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: Venice Beach home buried in sand after Milton
item.description: While most people are dealing with water in their homes, some homeowners are battling an inundation of sand.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, Fox 5

item.title: What to know as Florida residents begin cleaning up after Hurricane Milton
item.description: Cleanup from Hurricane Milton was underway Friday as residents returned home after the storm barreled across Florida, spawning tornadoes, knocking out power to millions, damaging homes and leading to hundreds of rescues.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Kentucky woman arrested after dismembered body parts found 'cooked' inside oven
item.description: A witness told state police that she was reportedly "casting spells" and being "confrontational" the day prior to the discovery.
item.dc:creator: Jace O'Barto, WGN 9

item.title: Actress Jessica Chastain slams airline over $15 credit
item.description: The actress was unhappy after the seatback screen didn't work on her recent Jet Blue flight. So, she took to X, formerly Twitter, to express her dismay.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WGN 9

item.title: Biden to visit Hurricane Milton-ravaged Florida with damage estimates 'around $50 billion'
item.description: The White House announced President Biden is scheduled to visit Florida on Sunday to survey the aftermath of Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Allred pushes back on Cruz transgender attack ads
item.description: “Ted Cruz is lying again, but now he's lying about our children. I'm a dad. I'm also a Christian,” Allred said on camera.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trial on hold for New Jersey man charged in knife attack that injured Salman Rushdie
item.description: MAYVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — The attempted murder trial of the man charged with severely injuring author Salman Rushdie in a 2022 knife attack was put on hold Friday while judges consider a request to move it to another county. Jury selection had been scheduled to start on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump swipes at Detroit during speech in Motor City
item.description: Former President Donald Trump on Thursday bashed the city of Detroit as a “mess” and called it a developing area during a speech in the Motor City.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: 7-Eleven to close over 400 locations in North America
item.description: Hundreds of “underperforming” 7-Eleven stores across North America are closing, the convenience store announced Thursday. Seven & I Holdings, 7-Eleven’s Japan-based parent company, revealed in its earnings report that 444 7-Eleven locations are closing.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Fidelity data breach exposed info from 77,000 customers: Was your account compromised?
item.description: Thousands of Fidelity Investments customers may have had their personal information stolen amid a data breach that occurred in August of this year, the financial firm announced.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Florida Gov. DeSantis helps Waffle House employees cook for first responders
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis put on the gloves and picked up a spatula at a Sarasota-area Waffle House on Thursday to help cook for first responders after Hurricane Milton left a path of destruction across the Tampa Bay area.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New ‘Harry Potter’ Squishmallows are here — and there’s a Dobby
item.description: Squishmallows just released a whole new set of "Harry Potter" toys, just in time for the holidays — and they're super cute, too.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lyft to reward safe driving in new initiative
item.description: Drivers will be able to see the estimated dollar-per-hour earnings for each ride up front under the initiative announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Michigan newspaper issues correction after Trump claims he won Man of Year award
item.description: A Michigan newspaper issued a correction after former President Donald Trump cited the paper at a speech in Detroit claiming he was Michigan’s “Man of the Year” in 2023.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Family sues after finding out on TikTok funeral home sent mom's body to wrong country
item.description: A family in New York City is suing a funeral home for mistakenly sending their mother Carmen Maldonado's casket to Guatemala for burial instead of Ecuador.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Internet Archive data breach exposes more than 31 million user accounts: reports
item.description: The Internet Archive, a popular digital library known for its Wayback Machine, was hacked and suffered a breach that reportedly exposed the data of 31 million user accounts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, ABC 4

item.title: Why do news media call the winners of elections?
item.description: It’s election night, the polls have closed and chances are you’re waiting on The Associated Press or one of the major television networks to say who will be the next president.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Residents slog through flooded streets, pick up debris after Milton
item.description: Florida residents slogged through flooded streets, gathered up scattered debris and assessed damage to their homes on Friday after Hurricane Milton smashed through coastal communities and tore homes to pieces, flooded streets and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton strikes Florida, officials warn of hurricane relief scams
item.description: As relief efforts continue following Hurricanes Helene and Milton, the U.S. Department of Justice is alerting the public to a rise in scams aimed at exploiting victims of these disasters.
item.dc:creator: Sahara Sriraman, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Milton spawned high number of destructive, deadly tornadoes
item.description: FT. PIERCE, Fla. (AP) — Dozens of tornadoes spawned by Hurricane Milton caught many Floridians by surprise as they braced for heavy rain, strong winds and storm surges. Violent twisters were seen crossing highways, ripping off roofs and downing trees and power lines.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT, ISABELLA O'MALLEY and SUMAN NAISHADHAM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hurricane Milton slams into Florida: What to know
item.description: Hurricane Milton slammed into Florida as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, heavy rain and tornadoes to much of the Gulf Coast, including communities already battered by deadly Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 20 lbs. of cocaine found in truck floorboard at South Texas port of entry
item.description: A truck driven by a U.S. citizen had over 20 pounds of cocaine hidden in the floorboards as it tried to enter the South Texas border from Mexico, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials said.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: West Virginia woman met her husband after getting donor lungs from his late sister
item.description: A woman from West Virginia got a new chance at life and found the love of her life thanks to organ donation.
item.dc:creator: Sam Kirk, Fox 5
